task.name: Agent Architecture Rework
task.description: Restructure the microecon simulation core from implicit 4-phase logic with instantaneous exchange to an explicit action-based 3-phase tick model (Perceive-Decide-Execute) with multi-state interaction semantics. Makes transaction costs explicit through tick-counted exchange sequences, enabling institutional comparison research.

vision_extraction.primary_goal: Make economic institutions visible, configurable, and comparable through explicit transaction costs
success_criteria: Transaction costs measurable as ticks (proposal, negotiation, coordination failure)
Agent sophistication as experimental variable via DecisionProcedure interface
Holdings separate from endowment enabling proper disagreement point tracking
Multi-state interaction enabling coordination failure analysis
deliverables: Action interface with Move, Propose, Accept, Reject, Wait
DecisionProcedure interface with available_actions, evaluate, choose
Conflict resolution for multiple proposals and mutual proposals

context.gap_analysis_summary: Current implementation has 4-phase tick with instantaneous exchange, binary CommitmentState, implicit actions, and endowment serving as both initial allocation and current holdings. Target requires 3-phase tick, multi-state InteractionState per agent, explicit Action enumeration, and separated Holdings/Endowment.
canonical_sources: Coase (1937), The Nature of the Firm
Williamson (1985), The Economic Institutions of Capitalism

phases.name: Agent Foundation
phases.description: Separate Holdings from Endowment on Agent class. Define InteractionState dataclass with Available/ProposalPending/Negotiating states and cooldown tracking.
phases.exit_criteria: Agent has holdings attribute, endowment is immutable, InteractionState dataclass defined with all states and transitions specified
phases.gate_verification: Agent construction succeeds with both holdings and endowment; InteractionState can represent all states from ADR-002

phases.name: Action System
phases.description: Define Action ABC with type, cost, preconditions, transform, tags. Implement concrete actions: Move, Propose, Accept, Reject, Wait. Define DecisionProcedure interface.
phases.entry_criteria: Phase 1 complete - Agent has holdings and InteractionState defined
phases.exit_criteria: All action types instantiate correctly, DecisionProcedure interface defined with rational baseline implementation
phases.gate_verification: Can create instances of all action types; DecisionProcedure.choose() returns valid action for test scenario

phases.name: Tick Restructure
phases.description: Replace 4-phase tick loop with 3-phase (Perceive, Decide, Execute). Implement conflict resolution for multiple proposals to same target and mutual proposals.
phases.entry_criteria: Phase 2 complete - Action types and DecisionProcedure available
phases.exit_criteria: Simulation.tick() uses 3-phase structure, agents select actions via DecisionProcedure, conflict resolution handles multi-proposal and mutual-proposal cases
phases.gate_verification: Simulation runs with new tick loop; conflict scenarios produce correct outcomes per ADR-003

phases.name: Exchange Sequence
phases.description: Implement multi-tick exchange: Propose (T) -> Accept/Reject (T+1) -> Negotiate (T+1) -> Execute. State transitions per ADR-002. Co-location validation throughout.
phases.exit_criteria: Full exchange sequence works across ticks, state transitions correct, co-location validated at each stage, cooldowns applied on rejection
phases.gate_verification: Two-agent exchange takes minimum 2 ticks; rejection triggers cooldown; co-location loss aborts exchange

phases.name: Event System
phases.description: Define new event types (ProposalEvent, ProposalResponseEvent, NegotiationEvent, CooldownEvent). Add exchange_id to all exchange events. Update TickRecord structure.
phases.exit_criteria: All exchange events logged with exchange_id, TickRecord includes interaction_states snapshot, analysis queries work
phases.gate_verification: exchange_duration() returns correct tick count; all events in sequence share same exchange_id

phases.name: Test Restoration
phases.description: Fix broken tests, rewrite tests incompatible with new architecture, add property tests for state machine invariants and conservation laws. Verify all tests pass.
phases.exit_criteria: All 667+ tests pass, new property tests for invariants added
phases.gate_verification: pytest runs green; property tests cover state machine transitions and conservation laws

gate_checks.1->2: Agent.holdings exists and is mutable; Agent.endowment is immutable; InteractionState dataclass defined
gate_checks.2->3: All Action types (Move, Propose, Accept, Reject, Wait) instantiate; DecisionProcedure interface implemented
gate_checks.3->4: Simulation.tick() uses Perceive-Decide-Execute; conflict resolution operational
gate_checks.4->5: Multi-tick exchange completes correctly; state transitions per ADR-002
gate_checks.5->6: Events logged with exchange_id; correlation queries return correct results

features.name: Holdings attribute on Agent
features.description: Add holdings: Bundle attribute to Agent, initialized as copy of endowment. Holdings is mutable; endowment becomes immutable.

functional: Agent has holdings attribute of type Bundle
Holdings initialized to endowment.copy() if not specified
Endowment cannot be mutated after construction
property: agent.holdings == agent.endowment at construction (when not specified)
Modifying holdings does not affect endowment
theory: Endowment defines disagreement point for Nash bargaining (O&R Ch 2)

features.name: Trade updates holdings not endowment
features.description: Modify bargaining protocol execution to update agent.holdings instead of agent.private_state.endowment.

property: sum(holdings) == sum(endowments) after any trade (conservation)
u(holdings) >= u(endowment) for both parties (individual rationality)

features.name: InteractionState dataclass
features.description: Define InteractionState with Available/ProposalPending/Negotiating states, proposal tracking, negotiation tracking, and per-partner cooldowns.

functional: InteractionState enum with AVAILABLE, PROPOSAL_PENDING, NEGOTIATING
AgentInteractionState dataclass with state, proposal_target, negotiation_partner, cooldowns
property: Agent starts in AVAILABLE state
Cooldowns dict starts empty

features.name: Action ABC
features.description: Define abstract Action class with type, cost(), preconditions(), transform(), tags properties/methods.

features.name: Concrete action types
features.description: Implement Move, Propose, Accept, Reject, Wait action classes inheriting from Action ABC.

property: ProposeAction.preconditions checks: AVAILABLE state, not in cooldown for target, co-located
AcceptAction.preconditions checks: has pending proposal from specified agent
RejectAction.preconditions checks: has pending proposal from specified agent

features.name: DecisionProcedure interface
features.description: Define DecisionProcedure ABC with available_actions(), evaluate(action), choose() methods.

property: choose() returns action from available_actions()
evaluate() returns higher score for higher expected utility

features.name: RationalDecisionProcedure
features.description: Implement baseline rational decision procedure that evaluates all available actions and chooses maximum expected utility.

functional: Evaluates Move actions by discounted surplus at destination
Evaluates Propose by expected trade surplus
Evaluates Accept by surplus from accepting
theory: Rational choice: choose action maximizing expected utility

features.name: Perceive phase
features.description: Implement PERCEIVE phase: freeze state, each agent observes within perception radius filtered by information environment.

functional: State frozen at start of tick
property: All agents observe same frozen state (no mid-tick updates visible)
theory: Simultaneous-move game: decisions based on common state

features.name: Decide phase
features.description: Implement DECIDE phase: each agent's DecisionProcedure.choose() called, actions collected.

functional: No agent sees another's pending action
property: Each agent produces exactly one action
Action satisfies preconditions at decision time

features.name: Execute phase
features.description: Implement EXECUTE phase: conflict resolution, action execution, state update.

functional: All actions execute against frozen state
State changes batched and applied atomically
property: Execution order by agent_id is deterministic
Same seed produces same outcome

features.name: Conflict resolution
features.description: Handle multiple proposals to same target (target chooses highest surplus), mutual proposals (both enter negotiating).

functional: Detect multiple proposals to same target
Target selects proposal with highest expected surplus
Non-selected proposers return to AVAILABLE (no cooldown)
Mutual proposals both enter NEGOTIATING directly
property: Ties broken by lower agent_id
Exactly one proposal accepted per target

features.name: Proposal state transition
features.description: Propose action transitions agent to PROPOSAL_PENDING. Track proposal_target and proposal_tick.

functional: Propose action sets state to PROPOSAL_PENDING
proposal_target set to target agent id
property: Proposal requires co-location with target
Proposal requires not in cooldown for target

features.name: Acceptance state transition
features.description: Accept action transitions both agents to NEGOTIATING. Reject transitions proposer to AVAILABLE with cooldown.

functional: Accept: both enter NEGOTIATING with each other
Reject: cooldown added to proposer for this target
Timeout (no response): proposer returns to AVAILABLE, no cooldown
Co-location lost: proposer returns to AVAILABLE, no cooldown
property: Cooldown duration = 3 ticks
Timeout = 1 tick

features.name: Negotiation and trade execution
features.description: NEGOTIATING state: bargaining protocol executes, trade completes or fails, both return to AVAILABLE.

functional: If success: holdings update, both return to AVAILABLE
If failure (no zone of agreement): both return to AVAILABLE, no cooldown
If co-location lost: both return to AVAILABLE
property: Negotiation duration = 1 tick
Conservation law holds after trade
theory: Trade outcome matches bargaining protocol specification (Nash, Rubinstein, etc.)

features.name: Co-location validation
features.description: Validate co-location at proposal, during waiting, during negotiation, at execution.

functional: Proposal expires if co-location lost before response
Negotiation fails if either agent moves (locked mode prevents this)
property: No trade occurs between non-co-located agents

features.name: Cooldown mechanics
features.description: Per-partner cooldowns: decrement each tick, remove at 0, prevent proposal while active.

functional: Decremented at start of each tick
property: Agent cannot propose to target while cooldown > 0

features.name: New event types
features.description: Define ProposalEvent, ProposalResponseEvent, NegotiationEvent, CooldownEvent dataclasses.

functional: ProposalEvent: tick, exchange_id, proposer_id, target_id, position
ProposalResponseEvent: tick, exchange_id, responder_id, proposer_id, response
NegotiationEvent: tick, exchange_id, agent_a_id, agent_b_id, protocol, outcome
CooldownEvent: tick, exchange_id, agent_id, target_id, duration, reason

features.name: exchange_id generation and propagation
features.description: Generate exchange_id on Propose, propagate through all events in sequence including TradeEvent.

functional: exchange_id generated when Propose action created
Carried through ProposalResponse, Negotiation, Trade events
property: All events in exchange sequence share same exchange_id

features.name: TickRecord updates
features.description: Update TickRecord to include interaction_states snapshot and unified events list.

features.name: Analysis query functions
features.description: Implement exchange_duration(), exchange_outcome(), rejection_rate() analysis functions.

functional: rejection_rate(events) returns fraction of proposals rejected
property: exchange_duration >= 2 for completed trades

features.name: Fix simulation tests
features.description: Update tests in test_simulation.py to work with new 3-phase tick model.

functional: Tests use new action-based API where appropriate

features.name: Fix matching tests
features.description: Remove CommitmentState tests, add InteractionState tests.

features.name: Property tests for invariants
features.description: Add hypothesis property tests for state machine invariants and conservation laws.

functional: State machine transition tests (no invalid transitions)
Conservation law tests (holdings sum = endowments sum)
property: No sequence of actions produces invalid InteractionState
sum(holdings) == sum(endowments) at every tick

features.name: Theory test preservation
features.description: Verify all theory tests (bargaining outcomes, surplus splits) still pass with new architecture.

resolved.rationale: Enables explicit action selection, measurable transaction costs, extensible action types
resolved.canonical_reference: Simultaneous-move games (O&R Game Theory); Coase (1937); Williamson (1985)

resolved.choice: Replace binary CommitmentState with per-agent InteractionState (Available/ProposalPending/Negotiating) + cooldowns
resolved.rationale: Enables multi-tick exchanges, rejection tracking, coordination failure analysis

resolved.choice: Propose (T) -> Accept/Reject (T+1) -> Negotiate (T+1) -> Execute, minimum 2 ticks
resolved.rationale: Makes transaction costs explicit as tick counts; enables protocol comparison

resolved.choice: Generate exchange_id on Propose, propagate through all events in sequence
resolved.rationale: Enables transaction cost measurement, exchange tracing, analysis queries

configuration.notes: All values fixed for initial implementation; extensibility deferred

escalation_triggers: Theory test failures (may indicate broken invariants in bargaining or surplus calculation)
More than 50% of tests failing at any checkpoint
Architectural ambiguity not covered by ADRs
Conservation law violations (holdings sum != endowments sum)
